_comment: Testnet feeds for the self-hosted xoxno-oracle-adapter (make testnet configureOracleFeeds). feed_id must match exactly what the off-chain bot submits (xoxno-lending-functions' devnet/stellar-bot-config priceJobs[].pairs entries). None of the RWA tokens below have a known Stellar TESTNET deployment (their real contract IDs found during research are Stellar MAINNET only) — every asset here uses tag=Other with the plain ticker as a placeholder, purely so the bot's submit/aggregate/read flow can be smoke-tested end to end. See mainnet_oracle_feeds.json for the real mainnet asset mappings and sourcing notes.
